Container.Name: rustyboy
Container.Overview: Game Boy emulator running entirely in the browser. Drop your .gb and .gbc ROMs into a folder and play from any device on your network.
Container.Description: Game Boy emulator running entirely in the browser. Drop your .gb and .gbc ROMs into a folder and play from any device on your network.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port to access the rustyboy web interface.

Config.Name: ROMs
Config.Description: Directory containing your .gb and .gbc ROM files.

Config.Name: ROMS_DIR
Config.Description: Path inside the container where ROMs are mounted. Change only if you customised the ROMs path above.
